message:
feat: wire InputArea into App component

App now accepts onSubmit, onSlashCommand, onExit, and initialHistory
props and renders InputArea below the StatusBar. InputArea shows
running/idle prompt based on session status and routes Ctrl+C to
interrupt (when running) or exit (when idle).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
